text: Recovery form asked for cause of failure. Wrote 'overconfidence with accessories.' Hatch Authority accepted it immediately.
Recovery crew found the Secret Hidden Pocket item and a note reading, 'told you this mattered.'
Medbay stamped me RETURNED MOSTLY, then sent the stamp to Security for emotional verification.
Recovery shower ran cold. Water Ration Desk called this a character-building allocation.
Held a brief eulogy for the backpack. Attendance: me, regret, and one recovered button.
Medbay punched my loyalty card. One more disaster and the ice pack is free.
Recovery crew note said 'found face down near obvious warning sign.' Rude, but complete enough for filing.
Checked the Secret Hidden Pocket first. Priorities remain legally concerning but emotionally correct.
